name: files_isdoc
description: Preview Czech ISDOC e-invoices in the Nextcloud Viewer

scripts.appstore: rm -rf build/appstore && mkdir -p build/appstore/files_isdoc && cp -r appinfo img js l10n lib LICENSES README.md CHANGELOG.md build/appstore/files_isdoc/ && tar -czf build/files_isdoc.tar.gz -C build/appstore files_isdoc && echo 'Created build/files_isdoc.tar.gz'
